Mod Version: The version of your mod (e.g., 1.0.0)
About Groups

You can organize your tails and banners into groups. The feature is optional and is provided by the 'Moddable Decal Groups' mod. Your mod will work without that optional mod, users without 'Moddable Decal Groups' will just see all your tails and banners in the same list. The 'Default' group is always available, it is the group that tails and banners will be in if you don't specify a group for them. You can add the same tail or banner to multiple groups.
